title: Payment Hold FAQs | Seller Centre
notes: eBay uses payment holds to temporarily retain funds to ensure buyers can be refunded if there's a problem with the transaction

title: Getting paid for items you've sold | eBay
notes: Sellers can choose to schedule payouts daily, weekly, biweekly, or monthly

title: Payouts on demand | Seller Center
notes: Allows sellers to request an express payout of their available funds on demand using a linked Visa or Mastercard debit card, with funds typically arriving within 30 minutes

title: PayPal Credit | eBay.com
notes: eBay offers PayPal Credit as a payment option for buyers. No Interest if paid in full in 6 months on purchases of $149 or more

title: Monitoring and improving your seller performance | eBay
notes: eBay has seller dashboards including Seller Standards Dashboard and Service Metrics Dashboard to showcase performance criteria

title: The CBT Seller Dashboard
notes: Designed specifically for sellers exporting on eBay to monitor selling performance across international markets

title: eBay Launches New Trading Cards Experience Bringing Price Guide & Collection Features to Enthusiasts
notes: eBay introduced AI-based photo background enhancement feature allowing sellers to swap backgrounds with AI-generated backdrops

title: Photo tips
notes: Photos must be at least 500 pixels on each side; accepted formats include JPEG, PNG, GIF, TIFF, BMP, WEBP, HEIC, or AVIF

title: Photo tips
notes: Official eBay seller help emphasizing product images are one of the most important things buyers use to decide whether to make an online purchase

title: Adding pictures to your listings | eBay
notes: eBay's photo uploader makes it easy to add and edit photos of items. Sellers can add up to 24 pictures per listing

title: eBay: Picture Manager FAQs
notes: Picture Manager hosted pictures and images for listings, About Me pages, eBay Stores. Service has been discontinued but photo uploader functionality continues

title: Picture policy | eBay
notes: Photos must be at least 500 pixels on the longest side. Prohibited: pictures that don't accurately represent the item, placeholder images, stock photos for used/damaged/defective items

title: Managing images using eBay Picture Services (EPS) | eBay Developers Program
notes: Images can be hosted by eBay Picture Services (EPS) or self-hosted, with some options like zoom only available if images are hosted through EPS

title: Automatic bidding | eBay
notes: To set up automatic bidding on an auction listing, enter the maximum amount you'd like to pay for the item and select Place bid

title: eBay Introduces New Top-Rated Seller Program
notes: eBay retired the PowerSeller program on June 20, 2021, replacing it with the Top Rated Seller program

title: eBay Launches its First-Ever Pre-Loved Fashion Week in New York and London
notes: eBay's inaugural Pre-Loved Fashion Week announced August 28, 2024, featuring live shoppable runway show 'Endless Runway' on September 5, 2024

title: Pre-loved Partner Program | Seller Center
notes: Allows business sellers to submit a free application for a chance to be recognized as one of the top sellers of pre-loved clothing on eBay

title: Preloved Partner Program Seller Agreement | eBay.com
notes: eBay's initiative to highlight pre-loved fashion items from certain business sellers, with items marked with a 'Preloved Partner Program' label and blue tick

title: Using the Price Guide
notes: Helps sellers with pricing by providing detailed market data including median sold price, sales format, sold price range for trading cards and collectibles

title: "Price Plus Shipping" Option on eBay Search - The eBay Community
notes: eBay search sort option that has filtering issues showing drastically reduced results when sorting by lowest price plus shipping first

title: Advanced search | eBay
notes: eBay's Advanced Search allows buyers to apply filters including price range, item condition, or listing format to find exactly what they're looking for

title: Printing and canceling shipping labels | eBay
notes: Sellers can print USPS, FedEx, or UPS shipping labels from Orders in My eBay or Seller Hub

title: Printing and canceling shipping labels | eBay
notes: Sellers save big over retail rates with eBay Labels, get free automatic tracking and no subscription fees

title: Priority campaign strategy | eBay
notes: Priority strategy helps reach highly motivated buyers with priority access to ad placements and advanced controls like keyword targeting using a cost-per-click (CPC) model

title: User Privacy Notice | eBay
notes: eBay's collection, use, disclosure, retention, and protection of personal information is governed by their User Privacy Notice

title: Private listings | eBay
notes: Private listings allow buyers to remain anonymous when they bid on or buy an item, with usernames hidden from other members viewing the listing

title: Private listings | eBay
notes: UK eBay help page for Private listings - same feature allowing buyers to remain anonymous

title: Checkout | eBay
notes: At checkout buyers can pay for items, choose delivery location, and review order details before payment

title: Product identifiers | Seller Center
notes: Product identifiers (Brand, MPN, UPC, EAN, ISBN) are required when listing in most categories on eBay and help increase item visibility

title: Product identifiers
notes: Export.ebay.com version covering product identifiers for international sellers

title: Product research | eBay
notes: eBay's Product Research tool (formerly Terapeak) is available free to Seller Hub sellers, providing access to last 3 years of eBay sales data

title: Product reviews | eBay
notes: Product reviews are item ratings and comments left by buyers who previously purchased the product, displayed on listings to help buyers
